---
title: "Recommender System - Approach"
author: IZZA KHAN
format: html
---

## Overview
In this assignment, I will build a personalized recommender system using survey data. Unlike the global baseline model, this system will generate user-specific recommendations based on individual preferences.

The goal is to produce Top-N recommendations for each user.

## Method
I will use a User-to-User Collaborative Filtering approach.

This method works by identifying users with similar preferences and recommending items liked by similar users.

Similarity will be measured using cosine similarity.

## Workflow

### Data Preparation
- Convert survey data into a user-item matrix
- Rows = users, Columns = items
- Handle missing values

### Similarity Calculation
- Compute similarity between users
- Identify nearest neighbors

### Prediction
- Predict ratings based on similar users
- Use weighted averages

### Output
- Generate Top-N recommendations per user
- Exclude already-rated items

## Evaluation
I will evaluate performance using a hold-out dataset.

Metrics:
- RMSE (for rating prediction)
- Ranking accuracy

## Tools
- R
- recommenderlab
- tidyverse

## Challenges
- Sparse data
- Choosing number of neighbors
- Avoiding popularity bias

## Goal
To create a personalized system that improves recommendation quality compared to a global model.
